description_long: This banner features a rectangular, horizontally oriented panel with a prominent blue and black butterfly graphic on the left side, accompanied by a splash of blue color and some stylized text. The background is a light, almost white shade, which helps the butterfly and text stand out. The banner appears to be made of a thin, rigid material, likely plastic or vinyl, and is flat with no visible support structure or mounting hardware. The reverse side of the banner is mostly blank, with only a faint blue pattern visible. The edges are clean and straight, suggesting it is designed for indoor or sheltered outdoor use. The overall design is modern and visually striking, suitable for drawing attention in public or commercial spaces.
description: A horizontal rectangular banner with a blue and black butterfly graphic, blue splash, and stylized text on a light background. The reverse side is mostly blank with a faint blue pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the butterfly graphic, blue splash, and text clearly on a light background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the banner and the butterfly graphic protruding slightly from the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly blank surface with a faint blue pattern and no visible text or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the butterfly graphic from a different angle and the flatness of the banner.
attribute_banner_content: butterfly graphic with text and blue splash
